name: Finger Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 12 sticks mozzarella cheese, sliced (1 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, stem and seed the bell pepper. Cut lengthwise into 1-inch strips. Then cut each strip crosswise into half-inch pieces.
2. Round one end of each piece to create a "fingernail" shape.
3. Cut each cheese stick in half crosswise.
4. On the rounded end of each cheese stick, cut a half-inch square notch.
5. Place the crusts on three baking sheets (12x15 inches each).
6. Spread 2 tablespoons of sauce evenly over each crust.
7. Arrange the cheese sticks and bell pepper pieces on top of each crust, spacing them well apart.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F for about 8 minutes, or until the cheese begins to melt.
Cooking Time: 8 minutes
Makes: 8 pizzas
